subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Time and again have I written to thee, and now once again my pen is in motion. Behold how [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله بکرات و مرات بتو نامه نگاشتم و باز قلم در حرکت است ملاحظه کن که
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
